sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54943" key="katapugi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπῡγίζω</orth>, <sense id="n54943.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">act like a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καταπύγων</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
